ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course (e.g., PHYS101) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course (e.g., Research Topics in Physics) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "grading_scale" TEXT /* Grading scale used for the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Physics Department) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department (e.g., Main Campus, Science Building) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Fall 2022) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the semester record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the semester record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the class belongs to */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester the class belongs to */,
  "class_number" TEXT /* Class number (e.g., 6477) */,
  "class_start_date" TEXT /* Date the class starts */,
  "last_day_to_enroll" TEXT /* Last day to enroll in the class */,
  "census_date" TEXT /* Census date for the class */,
  "class_end_date" TEXT /* Date the class ends */,
  "mode_of_delivery" TEXT /* Mode of delivery (e.g., In Person, Online, Hybrid) */,
  "class_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the class */,
  "meeting_days" TEXT /* Days of the week when the class meets */,
  "meeting_time" TEXT /* Start and end time of the class */,
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classroom where the class is held */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_classroom_id FOREIGN KEY ("classroom_id") REFERENCES classrooms ("classroom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classrooms" (
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classroom */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Number of the classroom (e.g., 101) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the classroom */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Equipment available in the classroom */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the classroom record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the classroom record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classroom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., Full-Time, Part-Time) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the class */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student in the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_instructors" (
  "class_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class-instructor assignment */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class section */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the instructor starts teaching the class */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the instructor stops teaching the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class-instructor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class-instructor record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_instructors_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance record */,
  "present" INTEGER /* Whether the student was present (true) or absent (false) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendance record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment submission */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the assignment */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was submitted */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received for the assignment */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the submission record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the submission record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program (e.g., Undergraduate, Graduate, Certificate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_requirements" (
  "program_requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program requirement */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the requirement belongs to */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course required */,
  "minimum_grade" TEXT /* Minimum grade required for the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program requirement record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program requirement record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_requirements_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_requirements_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, instructor, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role (e.g., view courses, edit assignments) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user permission record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user permission record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the prerequisite belongs to */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prerequisite record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prerequisite record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corequisites" (
  "corequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the corequisite belongs to */,
  "corequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corequisite course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the corequisite record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the corequisite record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corequisites_corequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("corequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
